meaning: adj.酒神的,酒神节的,放纵的n.酒神的信徒,酒神节,狂饮作乐
examples: His eye was alight, his color coppery, his air swagger, devil-may-care, bacchanal.
Might I add, that the audience is no longer hungry. and quite a bit fatter after this week's bacchanal.
To those monumental happenings the annual bacchanal of Carnival, now in full swing, seemed an appropriate backdrop.
Behrajan won the race which was marred by the death of popular chaser Bacchanal.
It is a great American bacchanal, and on Feb. 2, 2014, it will be here.
